description: Must have lived in DC for all of the tax year
Federal AGI must be $66000 or less if under age 70
Federal AGI must be $90000 or less if age 70 or older
Cannot be claimed as a dependent unless 65+
Cannot live in public or subsidized housing
Must claim eligible child as dependent
Must qualify for federal EITC first
Must own and reside in property
Must have income taxed by another state
Income at or below federal poverty
Must have qualifying student loan debt
Must live in CA more than half the year
Must have been in CA foster care at age 13+
Must have paid qualified college tuition
Must qualify for federal EITC (or ITIN equivalent)
Must be 65+ or widow(er) 50+ or disabled
Must have qualifying child (no childless credit)
Must be at least 25 if claiming without children
Must be under 65 if claiming without children
Must live in US more than half the year
Must be pursuing a degree at least half-time
Must not have completed first 4 years
Cannot be MFS unless domestic abuse exception
Must have qualifying child under 13 or disabled dependent
